Class Reservation

java.lang.Object
Entities.Reservation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Reservation extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a reservation in the restaurant. Stores information about the customer, table, bill, number of guests, reservation date and time, status, and notifications.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Reservation

      public Reservation(int reservationID, int customerID, int numOfGuests, int confirmationCode, LocalDate reservationDate, LocalTime reservationTime, ReservationStatus status, boolean isNotified)
      Constructs a new Reservation for a customer. Automatically sets the reservation placed date and time to now. Table and bill IDs are initialized as null.
      Parameters:
      reservationID - the unique ID of the reservation
      customerID - the ID of the customer making the reservation
      numOfGuests - the number of guests for the reservation
      confirmationCode - the confirmation code for the reservation
      reservationDate - the date of the reservation
      reservationTime - the time of the reservation
      status - the current status of the reservation
      isNotified - whether the customer has been notified

    • Reservation

      public Reservation(int reservationID, int customerID, Integer tableID, Integer billID, int numOfGuests, int confirmationCode, LocalDate reservationDate, LocalTime reservationTime, LocalDate reservationPlacedDate, LocalTime reservationPlacedTime, ReservationStatus status, boolean isNotified)
      Constructs a Reservation object from the database. All fields are initialized based on the stored values.
      Parameters:
      reservationID - the unique ID of the reservation
      customerID - the ID of the customer making the reservation
      tableID - the ID of the assigned table
      billID - the ID of the generated bill
      numOfGuests - the number of guests
      confirmationCode - the confirmation code
      reservationDate - the date of the reservation
      reservationTime - the time of the reservation
      reservationPlacedDate - the date the reservation was placed
      reservationPlacedTime - the time the reservation was placed
      status - the status of the reservation
      isNotified - whether the customer has been notified

      Returns the customer ID of the reservation.

      the table ID, or null if no table is assigned

      the bill ID, or null if no bill is generated

      Returns whether the customer has been notified.
      Returns:
      true if notified, false otherwise

      Sets the reservation status.
      Parameters:
      newStatus - the new reservation status

    • isReservationActive

      public boolean isReservationActive()
      Returns true if the reservation is active. Active statuses are CONFIRMED, PENDING, or SEATED.
      Returns:
      true if the reservation is active, false otherwise

    • isReservationCancelled

      public boolean isReservationCancelled()
      Returns true if the reservation is cancelled.
      Returns:
      true if the reservation is cancelled, false otherwise

      Sets the expected departure time.

      localTime - the expected departure time
